description: Template for aggregate root schemas in Domain-Driven Design

fields.name: aggregateId
fields.doc: Unique identifier for this aggregate root (UUID recommended)

fields.name: version
fields.doc: Version number for event sourcing and optimistic locking

fields.name: createdAt
fields.doc: Unix timestamp in milliseconds when aggregate was created

fields.name: updatedAt
fields.doc: Unix timestamp in milliseconds when aggregate was last updated

fields.name: state
fields.doc: Current state of the aggregate in its lifecycle

fields.name: snapshot
fields.doc: Current state snapshot of the aggregate

fields.name: lastEventId
fields.doc: ID of the last event applied to this aggregate

fields.name: eventCount
fields.doc: Total number of events applied to this aggregate

fields.name: entities
fields.doc: Child entities managed by this aggregate root

ai_prompts.generation: Generate an aggregate schema for {{AggregateName}} that manages {{entities}}
ai_prompts.events: Design event schemas that can be applied to this aggregate
ai_prompts.evolution: Evolve this aggregate to support {{new_behavior}} while maintaining consistency
